content:
很抱歉告诉大家，我们会将V2.2.3 特殊版本当前开放内容延长至少 7 天。每延长 1 天，我们都会通过邮件给大家发送 500 银芯补偿以示歉意。

为什么需要延期？因为我们实在是很想尽一切努力为杜勒赛因寻找最合适的配音演员，重新录制相关内容会需要额外的时间与预算。后续某个版本我们将可能会缩减 一定天数，来尽量抵消日程变化带来的影响。

We regret to inform everyone that the currently available content in the special version V2.2.3 will be extended for at least 7 more days. For each additional day of the extension, we will send 500 Silver Core to everyone via in-game mail as compensation and as an apology.

Why is this extension necessary? Because we are doing our utmost to find the most suitable voice actor for Doresain, and re-recording the related content will require extra time and budget. In a future update, we may shorten the duration of certain content to help offset the impact of this scheduling adjustment.
thread_title: ✅校猫碎碎念#杜勒赛因延期与补偿 Doresain Delay and Compensation
